Adds a discord spoiler when copying your wordle results.

This simple extension enhances your Wordle sharing experience.

Prevent Accidental Reveals: Protects friends and server members from seeing your solution, especially useful if they know your go-to starting word.

Automatic Spoilers: When you click the "Share" button on the official NYT Wordle page, your results are automatically copied to the clipboard with Discord spoiler tags (||) applied.

Discord Ready: Paste directly into any Discord chat or server. Your grid will be hidden until clicked.
Vibe with your creativity. Create with PixelVibe using webcam, screen capture, and audio of your choice

Vibe with your creativity!

Introducing PixelVibe Recorder for Chrome: Unleash Your Creativity and Productivity with Seamless Video Capture.

Are you ready to take your web recording and content creation to the next level? PixelVibe Chrome Recorder is here to revolutionize the way you capture and share your digital experiences. With PixelVibe, we've combined cutting-edge technology with an effortless user experience to help you save time, express your creativity, and boost your productivity.

Capture Anything, Anytime, Anywhere:

PixelVibe empowers you to capture the full spectrum of your digital world. Whether it's a specific browser tab, an entire window, or your entire screen, our recorder seamlessly captures it all. You're not limited to just what's on your screen; PixelVibe also records crystal-clear audio and video from your webcam, so you can effortlessly integrate your own personal touch into your recordings.

High-Quality Output, Effortless Download:

PixelVibe doesn't just capture, it delivers your content in top-notch quality. Your recordings can be easily saved in both the efficient and lightweight WebP format or the widely compatible MP4 format. No need for complicated export settings; just one click, and your recording is ready to download, saving you valuable time for what truly matters – creating and sharing.

One-Click Download:

We understand that simplicity and convenience matter, so we've made it as easy as possible for you. With PixelVibe, you can download your recordings with a single click. No more hassle searching through menus or waiting for lengthy rendering processes. Just click, and your content is in your hands.

Fast and Easy Sign-Up with Google:

Time is precious, and we don't want you to waste a second. PixelVibe offers fast and convenient sign-up using your Google account. No lengthy forms, no password hassles – just one click to authenticate, and you're in. It's the quickest path to unlocking the full potential of PixelVibe.

Unleash Your Creativity:

PixelVibe is more than just a recorder; it's your canvas for creative expression. Whether you're a content creator, educator, business professional, or simply someone who loves to share experiences, PixelVibe empowers you to bring your ideas to life. Create engaging tutorials, immersive presentations, captivating gameplay videos, or heartfelt vlogs – the possibilities are endless.

Boost Productivity with Seamless Workflow:

PixelVibe integrates seamlessly into your Chrome browser, ensuring a smooth workflow. No need to switch between applications or wrestle with complicated settings. With PixelVibe's intuitive interface and single-click download, you can focus on your tasks and projects without any distractions.

Stay at the Cutting Edge:

We're committed to keeping PixelVibe at the forefront of technology. Our team constantly updates and improves our recorder to provide you with the latest features and enhancements. With PixelVibe, you're always on the cutting edge, ready to adapt to the ever-evolving digital landscape.

PixelVibe Chrome Recorder is your key to a more efficient, creative, and productive digital experience. Capture, create, and share your world effortlessly with our user-friendly interface, high-quality output options, and seamless Google Sign-in authentication. Say goodbye to time-consuming processes and hello to the future of digital content creation with PixelVibe. Try it today and experience the difference for yourself.

Smart clipboard history with cleaned text copy support.

CopyCatch+ is a smart clipboard manager that records everything you copy and gives you the option to re-copy the original or a cleaned-up version.

View your clipboard history in a simple interface

Copy text as-is or as a cleaned version (removes extra spaces, symbols, and empty lines)

All data is stored locally for privacy

Ideal for writers, researchers, coders, and anyone tired of losing copied text.
Upgrades copy-paste into something intelligent. Detects what you copied and offers useful developer actions.

Smart Copy — Dev Tools turns your clipboard into a developer Swiss Army knife.

Every time you copy text, Smart Copy instantly detects what it is — JSON, URL, color code, CSV, HTML, regex, JWT, Base64, email, IP address, or plain code — and offers one-click actions tailored to that type.


What it does:
• Detects copied content type automatically
• Shows a subtle on-page notification with the detected type
• Opens a popup with smart actions when you click the extension icon

Actions by type:
• JSON — Prettify, minify, generate TypeScript types, convert to HTML table
• HTML — Format/prettify, convert tables to JSON
• CSV — Convert to JSON
• Colors — Hex ↔ RGB ↔ HSL conversion
• Code — Format, minify, wrap in markdown code block
• URLs — Decode, extract query parameters
• Regex — Explain pattern in plain English
• Base64 — Decode to plain text
• JWT — Decode payload
• All types — Character/word count, UPPERCASE, lowercase, trim whitespace

Key features:
• Works with any copy method — Ctrl+C, right-click copy, and site copy buttons (ChatGPT, Stack Overflow, etc.)
• Chain actions — feed the result of one action into the next
• Undo support — revert any transformation instantly
• Zero permissions beyond clipboard read — no data leaves your browser
• Dark theme UI designed for developers

No account required. No tracking. No network requests. Everything runs locally in your browser.
A Chrome extension to paste in template text with the last clipboard item slipped in using the {$$} token.

LazyPaster is a Chrome extension, that I created because I was tired of typing the same log messages/reasons while accessing systems. ✌️

Features

Quick Paste: Easily insert clipboard items into predefined templates and paste directly into form fields.
Custom Templates: Define custom text templates with placeholders for clipboard content.
Persistent Storage: Templates are saved in Chrome storage, so they’re available across sessions.
Button Customization: Customize button colours and titles for easy identification.
Template Management: Edit, delete, import, and export templates to streamline workflows.


Usage

Open the Extension: Click on the LazyPaster icon in your Chrome toolbar.
Add a New Template:
Enter a title for the template button.
Define the template text, including {$$} where the clipboard content should appear.
Select a button colour.
Click Add Template.
Using Templates: Click on a template button to paste the formatted text with the latest clipboard item into the active input field.
Edit Templates: Use the Edit button to modify an existing template.
Delete Templates: Click the Delete button to remove a template.
Import/Export Templates:
Export all templates as a JSON file for backup.
Import a JSON file to load previously saved templates.

Easily initiate calls from your browser by connecting to the mobile app via QR code.
ClickToCall enables users to start phone calls from numbers found on web pages by sending the selected or detected number to the paired mobile app.
Set a shortcut to capture a QR code on screen, or paste a screenshot into the popup.

QR Code Scanner — Screen Capture & Redirect

Instantly scan any QR code visible on your screen and open its link in a new tab — without picking up your phone.

Simply press your shortcut, draw a box around any QR code, and the destination URL opens automatically. Works on any webpage, PDF viewer, video call, image, or document displayed in Chrome.

Features:

Global shortcut — trigger a scan instantly with your shortcut
Click-to-scan — start a scan from the toolbar icon anytime
Draw to select — drag a box around any QR code on screen
Auto-redirect — detected URLs open immediately in a new tab
Works everywhere — any QR code visible in your browser window
100% private — all processing happens locally, no data is ever sent to a server

How to use:

Press your shortcut (or click the toolbar icon)
Draw a selection box around the QR code
The link opens automatically — done

Perfect for developers, remote workers, students, and anyone who regularly encounters QR codes on screen.

~* nabbing captures your clipboard activity. every copy you make in the browser is logged as a unit of data. it also includes the processing facility: an environment where your accumulated copies can be carried, broken down, tagged, and routed through a grid of stations by hand.

~* the facility is not designed to help you organize your data. the work is manual, the interface is deliberately laborious, and the outputs are generated from fragments that were never meant to be interpreted this way.

nabbing requires clipboard read permission in Chrome. all data is stored locally on your device. nothing is transmitted.
Save and revisit everything you've copied.

ClipStack gives you quick access to your recent clipboard history, right from your toolbar. As you copy text throughout your day, ClipStack quietly builds a browsable history so you can get back to anything you've copied without having to track it down again.

Features:
• Keeps your last 20 clipboard entries
• Instant search through your history
• Click any entry to copy it again in one click
• Hover over any item to delete it individually
• Clear all history with a single button
• Open instantly with Ctrl+Shift+V (Cmd+Shift+V on Mac)
• All data stays local on your device — nothing is sent to any server

Great for developers, writers, researchers, and anyone who works with a lot of copy and paste throughout the day.

Adds small forgivable human mistakes to AI-written text so it reads less robotic.

humAIne — make AI-written text sound human again.

 AI assistants leave fingerprints: em-dashes everywhere, curly quotes, "delve into," "leverage," "in conclusion,"
 perfect Oxford commas, and prose that's just a little too clean. humAIne rewrites pasted or selected text to read
 like a real person typed it — by reversing those tells and sprinkling in the kind of small, forgivable slips humans
 actually make.

 What it does
 - Replaces em-dashes (—), en-dashes (–), curly "smart" quotes, and the ellipsis character (…) with their
 plain-keyboard equivalents.
 - Swaps overused AI vocabulary: delve into → look into, furthermore / moreover / additionally → also, leverage /
 utilize → use, plethora / myriad → lots of, seamless → smooth, robust → solid. Drops filler like "in conclusion,"
 and "it is important to note that."
 - Adds light, realistic imperfections: dropped Oxford commas, missing intro commas after However / Therefore /
 Meanwhile, occasional missing apostrophe in contractions (don't → dont), the odd dropped trailing period.
 - Optional heavier slips for stronger output: missing space after a comma, lowercase standalone I, occasional typos.
 - Three presets — Light, Medium, Heavy — plus per-pattern probability sliders for full control.

 How to use it
 - Toolbar popup — paste text, click Humanize, copy the result. Optional: auto-paste your clipboard when the popup
 opens.
 - Right-click menu — select text on any page and choose "Humanize selection."
 - Keyboard shortcut — Ctrl+Shift+H (Cmd+Shift+H on Mac) to humanize the current selection.
 - Paste interception (optional) — paste AI text directly into any textarea, input, or rich editor, and humAIne
 rewrites it on the way in. Per-domain blocklist supported (e.g. mail.google.com, *.atlassian.net).

 Privacy
 - Everything runs locally in your browser. No accounts, no servers, no telemetry, no API keys. Your text never
 leaves your device.

 Permissions, briefly
 - storage — saves your pattern settings and blocklist.
 - contextMenus — adds the right-click "Humanize selection" item.
 - activeTab / clipboardRead / clipboardWrite — reads selected text and writes the humanized result back.
 - offscreen — performs clipboard operations from the service worker.

 Good for
 - Polishing ChatGPT / Claude / Gemini drafts before sending them in email, Slack, docs, or social.
 - Removing obvious AI tells from blog posts and marketing copy.
 - Anyone who's tired of em-dashes giving the game away.

 Light, deterministic, fully offline. Open the settings page to tune every pattern individually.
The extension contains tools for GoStudent QA and developers
X(Twitter)에서 코드를 붙여넣으면 자동으로 예쁜 이미지로 변환해주는 확장 프로그램

🎯 한 줄 요약
X(Twitter)에서 코드를 붙여넣으면 자동으로 예쁜 이미지로 변환해주는 확장 프로그램


개발자라면 공감하실 거예요

X(트위터)에서 코드를 공유하고 싶은데... 그냥 텍스트로 올리면 가독성이 영 별로죠.
들여쓰기도 무너지고, 신택스 하이라이팅도 없고, 뭔가 허전합니다.

그래서 보통은 이런 과정을 거치게 됩니다:

1. 코드 복사
2. ray.so나 carbon.now.sh 같은 사이트 접속
3. 코드 붙여넣기
4. 테마 선택, 설정 조정
5. 이미지 다운로드
6. 다시 X로 돌아와서 이미지 업로드

...솔직히 번거롭지 않나요? 😅

Codeshot은 이 모든 과정을 Ctrl+V 한 번으로 줄여줍니다.


어떻게 동작하나요?

정말 간단합니다.

1. 코드를 복사합니다 (VS Code, IntelliJ, 어디서든)
2. X.com 트윗창에 붙여넣기합니다
3. 코드가 감지되면 "코드를 이미지로 변환할까요?" 모달이 뜹니다
4. Enter 누르면 끝! 🎉

자동으로 예쁜 코드 이미지가 생성되어 트윗에 첨부됩니다.

혹시 그냥 텍스트로 붙여넣고 싶다면? Esc를 누르거나 취소 버튼을 클릭하면 됩니다.
바로 이미지로 변환하고 싶다면? Ctrl+Shift+V (Mac: Cmd+Shift+V)를 쓰면 모달 없이 즉시 변환됩니다.


주요 기능

🔍 스마트 코드 감지
붙여넣는 내용이 코드인지 일반 텍스트인지 자동으로 판단합니다. IDE에서 복사한 코드는 더 정확하게 인식하고, 휴리스틱 분석으로 일반 텍스트 에디터에서 복사한 코드도 잘 감지합니다.

🎨 6가지 테마
• Dracula - 인기 있는 보라색 계열 다크 테마 (기본값)
• GitHub Dark - GitHub 스타일의 깔끔한 다크 테마
• GitHub Light - 밝은 배경을 선호하시는 분을 위한 라이트 테마
• Monokai - Sublime Text로 유명해진 클래식 테마
• One Dark - Atom 에디터의 시그니처 테마
• Nord - 북유럽 감성의 차분한 블루 테마

⚙️ 세부 설정
• 폰트 크기 조절 (12px ~ 20px)
• 폰트 선택 (JetBrains Mono, Fira Code, SF Mono, Menlo, Consolas 등)
• 줄 번호 표시 On/Off
• 최대 라인 수 제한 (긴 코드 자동 잘림)

⌨️ 키보드 단축키
• Ctrl/Cmd + V - 붙여넣기 (코드 감지 시 모달 표시)
• Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + V - 즉시 이미지 변환 (모달 스킵)
• Enter - 변환 확인
• Esc - 취소 (텍스트로 붙여넣기)


지원하는 언어

Shiki 문법 하이라이터를 사용해서 거의 모든 프로그래밍 언어를 지원합니다:

JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Java, C, C++, C#, Go, Rust, Ruby, PHP, Swift, Kotlin, Scala, HTML, CSS, SCSS, SQL, Shell/Bash, PowerShell, JSON, YAML, XML, Markdown, GraphQL, Docker, Terraform 등등...

그리고 언어를 자동으로 감지해서 적절한 하이라이팅을 적용합니다!


이런 분들께 추천합니다

✅ X에서 기술 콘텐츠를 자주 공유하는 개발자
✅ 코드 스니펫을 예쁘게 공유하고 싶은 분
✅ ray.so, carbon.now.sh 왔다갔다 하기 귀찮으신 분
✅ 트위터에서 #개발 #프로그래밍 태그로 활동하시는 분
✅ 기술 교육 콘텐츠를 만드시는 분


개인정보 및 보안

Codeshot은 여러분의 코드를 어디에도 전송하지 않습니다.

• 모든 이미지 생성은 로컬 브라우저에서 처리됩니다
• 외부 서버로 코드가 전송되지 않습니다
• 클립보드 데이터는 이미지 생성 후 즉시 폐기됩니다
• 설정 데이터만 Chrome sync storage에 저장됩니다 (테마, 폰트 등)

오픈소스 프로젝트이니 코드가 궁금하시면 직접 확인해보세요!


사용 팁 💡

1. IDE에서 복사하면 더 정확해요
VS Code, IntelliJ, Sublime Text 등 IDE에서 코드를 복사하면 MIME 타입 정보가 함께 복사되어 코드 감지가 더 정확합니다.

2. 짧은 코드는 더 예뻐요
트윗에 첨부되는 이미지 특성상, 10~30줄 정도의 핵심 코드가 가장 보기 좋습니다. 너무 긴 코드는 설정에서 최대 라인 수를 조절해보세요.

3. 테마는 취향껏!
다크 테마가 대세이긴 하지만, 가독성을 위해 GitHub Light 테마를 선호하는 분들도 많습니다. 여러 테마를 시험해보고 자신만의 스타일을 찾아보세요.

4. 팝업에서 미리보기
확장 프로그램 아이콘을 클릭하면 설정 팝업이 열립니다. 여기서 테마와 설정을 바꾸면 다음 변환부터 적용됩니다.


피드백 & 문의

버그 리포트, 기능 제안, 또는 그냥 인사라도 환영합니다! 😊
GitHub Issues나 X로 연락주세요.


Codeshot과 함께 더 예쁜 코드 공유를! 🚀
Copy text without formatting, with 10+ premium features like Markdown, CSV, and Sanitized HTML.

🚀 What is CopyFormat?
CopyFormat is a premium browser enhancement built for copy text without formatting, with 10+ premium features like markdown, csv, and sanitized html.. It combines professional-grade engineering with a sleek, modern interface, providing you with a high-performance tool that fits perfectly into your daily digital workflow.

🛠️ Core Features & Functionality
✔️ ⚡ Smart Automation: Automatically handles copy text without formatting, with 10+ premium features like markdown, csv, and sanitized html. to save you time.
✔️ 🔒 Privacy First: All data processing is done locally; your information is never uploaded or shared.
✔️ 🚀 Ultra-Fast Core: Optimized for zero-latency performance, ensuring your browser stays responsive.
✔️ 🎨 Premium UI: A beautiful, intuitive dashboard designed for maximum clarity and control.

🔍 How It Works: Step-by-Step
1️⃣ Install: Add CopyFormat to your browser from the Chrome Web Store.
2️⃣ Access: Click the extension icon in your toolbar to open the dashboard.
3️⃣ Enhance: Use the intuitive controls to instantly perform copy text without formatting, with 10+ premium features like markdown, csv, and sanitized html..
4️⃣ Tailor: Personalize the settings to match your specific needs and style.

📈 Use Cases: How Can it help You?
✔️ Professionals: Streamline your research and task management by automating copy text without formatting, with 10+ premium features like markdown, csv, and sanitized html..
✔️ Content Creators: Efficiently manage your digital assets and tools during your creative process.
✔️ Daily Users: Enjoy a cleaner, more efficient web experience by removing manual repetitive steps.

What Problems Does It Solve?
✔️ Eliminates Manual Labor: No more wasting time on repetitive copy text without formatting, with 10+ premium features like markdown, csv, and sanitized html. tasks.
✔️ Simplifies Technical Barriers: Provides an easy-to-use interface for complex web functions.
✔️ Increases Privacy Awareness: Offers a local alternative to cloud-based tools that track your data.

❓ Frequently Asked Questions
✔️ Q: Is CopyFormat free to use?
✔️ A: Yes, we provide a robust free version with essential features, and premium options for even more power.
✔️ Q: How can I report a bug or suggest a feature?
✔️ A: Please visit our support URL at https://dreamanart.com/support for any feedback.
최근 복사한 텍스트와 이미지 히스토리를 관리해주는 프리미엄 클립보드 매니저

매일 수많은 텍스트와 이미지를 복사하고 붙여넣는 당신을 위한 완벽한 클립보드 매니저입니다.

방금 전에 복사했던 내용이 기억나지 않거나 덮어씌워져서 다시 원래 페이지를 찾아가야 했던 불편함을 이제 'Clip Stack'으로 해결하세요.

주요 기능:
✨ 텍스트 & 이미지 완벽 수집: 텍스트뿐만 아니라 화면 캡처(Win+Shift+S) 이미지까지 완벽하게 저장합니다.
✨ 무손실 자동 저장: 복사(Ctrl+C) 또는 잘라내기(Ctrl+X) 시 즉각적으로 기록되며, 팝업을 여는 즉시 깔끔하게 정렬됩니다.
✨ 프리미엄 골드 UI: 투박한 디자인은 그만, 세련된 글래스모피즘(Glassmorphism) 기반의 아름다운 UI를 제공합니다.
✨ 선제적 텍스트 추적: 까다로운 웹사이트의 복사 방지 로직마저 우회하는 강력한 수집 엔진이 탑재되었습니다.
✨ 철저한 프라이버시 보호: 모든 데이터는 사용자의 브라우저 로컬 저장소에만 안전하게 보관되며, 언제든 클릭 한 번으로 영구 삭제가 가능합니다.

이제 복사한 내용을 잃어버릴 걱정 없이, 프리미엄 클립보드 매니저와 함께 스마트한 웹 서핑을 즐겨보세요!

Highlights URLs and DOIs from your custom list on any webpage

DOI Link Highlighter helps researchers and academics track papers across the web by highlighting DOIs and URLs from customizable lists that you create and manage.

Simply add DOIs or URLs to your custom lists (one per line), choose your highlight colors, and the extension will automatically highlight matching links on any webpage you visit. This extension was created because I needed to sift through publications spanning 80+ years in the literature and needed to keep track of which links I had previously visited and which ones were beneficial (highlighted green) or not (highlighted red). Using this extension allowed me to quickly see if any papers had already been reviewed.

FEATURES:
- Two customizable highlight lists with unique colors (default green and red)
- Add DOIs/URLs to your lists manually or via keyboard shortcuts
- Highlight clickable links or both links and printed text
- Smart DOI pattern recognition (10.xxxx/xxxxx format)
- Keyboard shortcuts for quick additions (Alt+Q, Alt+W)
- Works on journal sites, preprint servers, and all websites

PERFECT FOR:
- Literature reviews
- Avoiding duplicate papers
- Tracking citations across multiple sources
- Managing reading lists

HOW TO USE:
1. Add DOIs or URLs to List 1 or List 2 (one per line)
2. Choose your highlight colors
3. Visit any webpage - matching links light up automatically!

KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS:
- Alt+Q: Add clipboard link to List 1
- Alt+W: Add clipboard link to List 2
- Alt+Shift+Q: Add current page to List 1
- Alt+Shift+W: Add current page to List 2

Please note that shortcuts for this extension can be changed in "chrome://extensions/shortcuts"

No data whatsoever is collected. All lists in your sets are stored locally in your browser.
Advanced clipboard history manager with favorites, tags, export, statistics, and more!

ClipTrack is a premium, high-performance clipboard manager designed to supercharge your productivity. Every time you copy, cut, or paste, ClipTrack is there to securely record it, ensuring you never lose a link, piece of code, or important snippet ever again.

Why choose ClipTrack?

🚀 BLAZING FAST PERFORMANCE
Built on Chrome's latest Manifest V3 architecture, ClipTrack is lightweight and responsive.

🎨 STUNNING VISUALS
Experience a modern, professional interface with Glassmorphism aesthetics. Choose between a crisp Light Mode or a sleek Dark Mode to suit your work environment.

🔍 SMART ORGANIZATION
• Search through hundreds of clips in milliseconds.
• Pin your most important snippets to "Favorites".
• Use "Tags" to categorize your data (e.g., #Work, #Personal, #Code).
• One-click export to JSON, CSV, or Text formats.

📊 USAGE INSIGHTS
The "Statistics & Insights" dashboard gives you a visual overview of your clipboard habits, most visited sites, and total productivity gains.

🔒 PRIVACY FIRST
Your data is YOURS. ClipTrack operates 100% locally. Your clipboard history never leaves your machine and is never sent to any external server.

⚡ PRODUCTIVITY HACKS
• Built-in Snippet Library for frequently used responses.
• Customizable keyboard shortcuts for ultra-fast access.
• Bulk selection tools for quick cleanup.

Stop losing your copies. Start tracking with ClipTrack today!
